# patoapis

Paid API products with protected production endpoints. Active marketplace
listings link to their matching RapidAPI products, and each product page shows
the current commercial access path.

Machine-readable catalog: https://patoapis-paid-apis.onrender.com/apis.json
RFC 9727 API catalog: https://patoapis-paid-apis.onrender.com/.well-known/api-catalog

## RemoteJobsAPI

Normalized remote job listings from Jobicy and Himalayas with search, filters,
pagination, job details, statistics, freshness metadata, source attribution,
and resilient caching.

Product page: https://patoapis-paid-apis.onrender.com/remote-jobs-api.html
Purchase: https://rapidapi.com/patoalba2019/api/remotejobsapi

## WorldCupTravelDealsAPI

World Cup 2026 travel planning and deal-scoring data for all 16 host cities,
including official FIFA links, provider search routes, heuristic reference
estimates, and transparent scoring for buyer-supplied offers. It is positioned
as a planning and offer-scoring API rather than a booking engine.

Product page: https://patoapis-paid-apis.onrender.com/world-cup-travel-api.html
Purchase: https://rapidapi.com/patoalba2019/api/worldcuptraveldealsapi


## GlobalDealRadarAPI

Global deal intelligence for apps, newsletters, dashboards, shopping tools and AI agents. It normalizes public deal signals with categories, scoring, price fields, source attribution, search, filters and stats. Product data endpoints require an authorized paid marketplace gateway.

Product page: https://patoapis-paid-apis.onrender.com/global-deal-radar-api.html
Commercial access: https://patoapis-paid-apis.onrender.com/global-deal-radar-api.html

## OmniReplyAIAPI

Paid multilingual AI reply API for WhatsApp, Telegram, Messenger, Instagram,
webchat, SMS and email customer-service workflows. It generates reply text,
detected language, intent, sentiment, confidence, quick replies, escalation
flags and webhook normalization. Commercial endpoints require an authorized
paid marketplace gateway.

Product page: https://patoapis-paid-apis.onrender.com/omnireply-ai-api.html
Commercial access: https://patoapis-paid-apis.onrender.com/omnireply-ai-api.html

## Commercial access

Product endpoints use authorized paid marketplace gateway access. Lightweight
health endpoints are public only for operational monitoring.
